title: Unit Overview Outline
description: Sketch a multi-lesson unit outline from a topic and target duration.
template: Help me outline a teaching unit. Ask for the subject, grade level, topic, and number of class periods if I haven't provided them. Then produce a day-by-day outline (one line per day) covering key concepts, a suggested culminating assessment, and any prerequisite knowledge students should already have. Keep suggestions general enough to adapt to my specific classroom.
